---
title: "Machine Learning in Time Series"
subtitle: "Professor Marcelo Villena Ch., PhD"
---

## Course Description

This course introduces the fundamentals and advanced techniques of **Machine Learning** applied to the analysis and modeling of **Time Series**. Both the theoretical foundations and the practical implementation of the models are covered.

## Contents

| \#  | Lecture                              | Topics                                                                           |
|--------------|-----------------|-----------------------------------------|
| 1   | [Lecture 1](lectures/lecture_01.qmd) | Historical Evolution, the Prediction Problem, and Shrinkage                      |
| 2   | [Lecture 2](lectures/lecture_02.qmd) | Kernel Methods and Support Vector Machines (SVM) for Time Series                 |
| 3   | [Lecture 3](lectures/lecture_03.qmd) | High-Dimensional Linear Dynamics (BVAR, Sparse VAR, & Structured Regularization) |
| 4   | [Lecture 4](lectures/lecture_04.qmd) | Deep Learning for Sequences (RNN/LSTM and Attention-Based Forecasting)           |
| 5   | [Lecture 5](lectures/lecture_05.qmd) | Trees, Boosting, and Ensembles for Nonlinear Forecasting                         |
| 6   | [Lecture 6](lectures/lecture_06.qmd) | The Frontier: Attention, Text, and Causal ML                                     |

## Prerequisites

-   Basic knowledge of statistics and probability
-   Programming in Python or R
-   Linear algebra

## Instructor

**Marcelo Villena Ch., PhD**\
Universidad Técnica Federico Santa María, Chile\
📧 [marcelo.villena\@usm.cl](mailto:marcelo.villena@usm.cl)\
🌐 [www.marcelovillena.com](https://www.marcelovillena.com/)\
💼 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/marcelovillena)
